title: MCP SDK NotificationOptions Import Path
context: Setting up MCP server and getting AttributeError: module 'mcp.types' has no attribute 'NotificationOptions'
what_happened: MCP server initialization failed because NotificationOptions was incorrectly imported from mcp.types. The correct import is from mcp.server.lowlevel.server.
why: MCP SDK v1.x moved NotificationOptions to the lowlevel server module. Code examples and old docs may show the wrong import path.
action: Always import NotificationOptions from 'mcp.server.lowlevel.server', not 'mcp.types'. Check: from mcp.server.lowlevel.server import NotificationOptions
